Comment on attachment 231503
Patch for usr.sbin/mlx5tool/mlx5tool.8 restoring the original wording for the -e flag

While here or in another bug, I'd suggest light copy-editing of the 2 lines above to:

The buffer must be empty; in other words, no dumps should be written so
far, or any existing dump cleared with the

Other than that, change makes sense at a glance.
